THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT KIRK SMITH DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- OVERRULED FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE ADEQUATE NOTICE. MAIL SERVICE WAS PERFECTED ON JULY 16TH, THE HEARING IS 25 DAYS LATER, WHERE 26 IS REQUIRED. THE PLAINTIFF WILL PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER; DEFENDANT WILL HAVE 5 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER WITHIN WHICH TO FILE HIS ANSWER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. HON. JAMES L. WARREN, 301 REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-11-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kirk Smith, Defendant Propria Persona
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT KIRK SMITH DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Overruled for failure to provide adequate notice. Mail service was perfected on July 16th, the hearing is 25 days later, where 26 is required. The Plaintiff will prepare a form of order; Defendant will have 5 days from notice of entry of order within which to file his answer. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Hon. JAMES L. WARREN, 301 Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
